# Richard Hudson Jr.

> Revenue Operations Professional based in Dallas, TX, serving the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex. Personal portfolio and engineering blog covering RevOps, sales automation, partnership programs, and data analytics. SalesLoft Admin Certified (Level 1 & 2), HubSpot Revenue Operations Certified.

## Pages

- [About](https://richardwhudsonjr.com/about): bio, certifications, experience, FAQ
- [Projects](https://richardwhudsonjr.com/projects): selected RevOps case studies — pipeline analytics, partner performance, CRM optimization
- [Blog](https://richardwhudsonjr.com/blog): essays on revenue operations, data analytics, and business intelligence
- [Resume](https://richardwhudsonjr.com/resume): professional resume with downloadable PDF
- [Contact](https://richardwhudsonjr.com/contact): reach out for consulting engagements

## Feeds

- [RSS](https://richardwhudsonjr.com/api/blog/rss): blog feed (XML)

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://richardwhudsonjr.com/sitemap.xml): full URL index
